name: CLMP Certification Programme
description:
The Certified Loyalty Marketing Professional programme is a six-week cohort-based certification covering programme design, technology selection, P&L modelling, partner economics, and operations. Live cohorts run quarterly in London and Dubai with virtual attendance available.

Includes: 12 live sessions, capstone project, 1:1 mentoring with the QBF faculty, and lifetime access to the alumni community.

name: Loyalty Strategy Workshop
description: A two-day intensive workshop run on-site for executive teams. We diagnose your current programme, stress-test the economics, and leave you with a concrete 100-day action plan. Maximum 12 participants per session.

name: Loyalty Fundamentals Training
description: An on-demand training track for marketing and CRM teams new to loyalty. Eight modules covering strategy, mechanics, technology, and analytics. Self-paced, with an optional live Q&A every month.

name: Programme Health Check
description: A six-week diagnostic that benchmarks your loyalty programme against industry leaders, surfaces the top financial risks, and delivers a board-ready prioritisation matrix. Ideal for programmes with 500K+ active members.
